title: michaelalber/grounded-code-mcp
summary: Ground your AI coding agent in the books, standards, and docs you actually trust. A local MCP RAG server that makes your preferences the default.

title: greg-gzillion/clawpack_v2
summary: 🦞 Unified AI Agent Ecosystem with Common Chronicle-inspired knowledge indexing. 15+ specialized agents for documents, diagrams, blockchain, math, translation, and more.

title: bazzi24/RAGEve
summary: Local-first RAG platform — Ollama + Qdrant + Redis + MinIO. No cloud, no API keys, runs entirely on your machine.

title: OpenCognit/Opencognit
summary: The open-source AI agent OS. CEO orchestrator, persistent memory, real execution, atomic budgets. Self-hosted. No cloud lock-in.

title: pat-the-geek/obsirag
summary: Un cerveau qui apprend de tes notes Obsidian : RAG local, génération d'insights automatiques, enrichissement web sur sources fiables. Python · LanceDB · Ollama · Euria

title: OpenCoworkAI/open-codesign
summary: Open-source Claude Design alternative. One-click import your Claude Code / Codex API key. Prompt → prototype / slides / PDF. Multi-model (Claude, GPT, Gemini, Kimi, GLM, Ollama). BYOK, local-first, MIT.

title: hwdsl2/docker-litellm
summary: Docker image for a self-hosted LiteLLM AI gateway proxy. Unified OpenAI-compatible API for 100+ LLM providers. Features auto-config on first start, virtual key management, spend tracking, and persistent data via Docker volume.

title: JohanYP/Opencode-Assistant
summary: Self-hosted personal AI assistant on Telegram. Powered by OpenCode + Claude Sonnet (free big-pickle). OpenClaw skills compatible. SQLite + MCP live memory with optional Ollama vector search.

title: hwdsl2/docker-ollama
summary: Docker image to run an Ollama local LLM server. Secure by default, all API requests require a Bearer token (auto-generated on first start). OpenAI-compatible API. Supports first-start model pre-pull, NVIDIA GPU (CUDA) acceleration, and persistent model storage. Multi-arch: amd64, arm64.

title: vaibhavpandeyvpz/hooman
summary: Hooman is a hackable AI agent toolkit for local workflows.

title: Glad-Labs/poindexter
summary: Poindexter — open-source AI content pipeline that researches, writes, reviews, and publishes autonomously. Self-hosted on your machine. Built by Glad Labs LLC.

title: bedeberger/bookstack-lektorat
summary: KI-gestütztes Lektorat-Tool für BookStack

title: selfagency/agentsy
summary: 🤖 WIP agentic development framework

title: siriusbkid-commits/gideon-pbq-generator
summary: Offline agentic PBQ generator for Identity & Access Management certification training. No API keys. No cost. No limits.

title: bradleybond512/crystal-ball
summary: Tauri 2 desktop intelligence platform — Cesium.js 3D globe, 185 live panels, MCP server for Claude Code, and an explainable algorithm intelligence layer (truth scoring, evidence graph, compound risk, forecast calibration) plus shortage / weather / insights engines. 600+ deterministic tests.

title: thisisait/nOS
summary: An opensource agentic system infrastructure - not an OS

title: senda-labs/DQIII8
summary: Works for you. Go outside and live. — AI orchestrator that auto-routes tasks to the cheapest model that solves them. 70% run free on local models. Self-auditing, self-improving, zero prompting skill needed. Built with vibe coding by a finance student. Your models, your data.

title: gumieri/nenya
summary: A lightweight, highly secure AI API Gateway/Proxy written in Go. Acts as transparent middleware between local AI coding clients (OpenCode/Aider/Cursor) and upstream LLM providers (Gemini, DeepSeek, Zhipu z.ai).

title: AlexanderPolozhnov/careerpilot-ai
summary: CareerPilot AI — full-stack job search management platform with AI-assisted vacancy analysis, application tracking, reminders, and analytics.  Status: In active development.

title: denn-gubsky/loomcycle
summary: Lightweight multi-tenant agentic runtime in one Go sidecar. Owns the LLM tool-use loop across Anthropic, OpenAI, and   Ollama with native prompt-cache control, MCP tool dispatch, and per-tenant fairness. TypeScript and Python adapters over   HTTP+SSE. Powers JobEmber.
